top_gear_ratio.notes: Official Audi technical-data material lists 0.604 as the top forward gear ratio for the checked exact state.

verification_notes.note: Official Audi 2023 A3 Sedan 30 TDI technical-data material replaces the inherited family defaults for the checked manual state: FWD, 6-speed manual, 0.604 top gear, equal 3.238 final-drive values, and 205/55 R16 basic tires. The MY2026 price list confirms a later TDI 85 kW manual Limousine state, but unchanged 2021-2026 continuity remains unproven.
